valencian-paella-recipe-step-by-step-com.name: Valencian Paella Recipe Step By Step

instructions: A medium paella adds olive oil and starts frying with soft heat chicken and rabbit pieces until they are slightly golden from all sides.
Then add the flat green beans and stir them up for a few minutes, and be sure they don't get burned.

Now his turn to his tomato and his white beans. The tomato previously minced into small pieces or, if you prefer, pitted. Mix well with other ingredients. At this moment you will also have to put the pimenton powder. Let them get cold for a few minutes.
He then adds chicken broth, saffron strands, rosemary and a pint of salt and freshly ground pepper. The plate temperature's up.
When you start boiling the fluid, add the rice evenly into the paella and stir a little. Check his salt and if necessary get him more.
En este momento puedes agregar el pimiento rojo por encima, cortado en tiritas para adornar.
When water evapors almost completely, always care that it does not completely dry, lower the paella temperature and cover with a large cover or with an aluminum paper.
Let's cook for about 10 minutes. Test the grain and if it's ready, then eat paella valenica.

vanilla-chocolate-praline-argiro.name: Vanilla-chocolate-praline

ingredients.item: 300 g chocolate praline very finely chopped
300 g chocolate praline very finely chopped

instructions: all materials must be at room temperature.
Preheat the evening to 170°C in resistance.
Butter round baking pan 30 cm or 25cm square.
Beat the butter in the mixer with the sugar to fluffy well and hang.
One at a time, add the eggs and beat for long enough to neutralize the egg smell.
The more we hit them, the less they smell afterwards.
Add the vanilla, salt and yogurt, mix and add the flour.
Add the finely chopped chocolate.
Mix.
Take half the vanilla mixture and add the cocoa.
We mix to homogenize.
Empty the buttered pan.
We touch the surface spoons of chocolate grinder and half the broken chocolates.
Spread the vanilla mixture over a layer.
Bake on the bottom grill for about 45′, until the surface is golden and puffed.
Once removed from the oven, sprinkle with the remaining chopped chocolate to melt while hot.
After it cools, sprinkle with the broken chocolates and steam lightly.
Tip: Double the dose, no crumb left!!!

vegan-apple-pie.name: Vegan Apple Pie
instructions: Make the crust: In a large bowl, combine the flour, sugar, and salt.
Add the cubed butter, a bit at a time, and use a fork to work it into the flour with a fork until it breaks down to dime-sized pieces.
Gradually add the ice water and mix just until the dough can be pressed together.
Divide the dough in half and shape into discs. Wrap in plastic wrap and chill in the fridge for 1 hour.
Preheat the oven to 350˚F (180˚C).

Make the filling: Peel and core apples, then thinly slice. Transfer to a large bowl and add 2 cups (200 G) of sugar, the lemon zest, cornstarch, lemon juice, 1 teaspoon melted coconut oil, salt, and 3 teaspoons cinnamon. Toss until the apples are well-coated. Set aside.

On a lightly floured surface, roll out both of the discs of dough to about 1 inch (2 cm) thick. Transfer one round to a greased 8-inch (20-cm) pie dish and gently press against the bottom and sides. Trim the excess dough around the edges, then prick the bottom of the pie crust all over with a fork

Pour the apples into the bottom crust and cover with the top crust. Trim the excess dough around the edges, then crimp the top and bottom crusts together with a fork. Brush the top of the crust with the remaining tablespoon of melted coconut oil and sprinkle with the remaining teaspoon of sugar and cinnamon. Cut 4 vents in the top crust
Bake for 1 hour, until crust is starting to turn golden brown.
Let cool for 10 minutes, then slice and serve.
Enjoy!

vegan-broth-recipe-the-base-for-your-rec.name: Vegan Broth Recipe: The Base For Your Recipes
vegan-broth-recipe-the-base-for-your-rec.original_name: Receta de caldo vegano: la base perfecta para tus recetas

ingredients.item: 1 onion (cut into quarters (you can leave skin for more color))
1 piece of fresh ginger (optional, for an Asian touch)

instructions: In a large pot, place all the vegetables: carrots, celery, onion, garlic, leg and ginger (if you use them). No cuts are necessary too small as they will then sew up their broth.
Add the bay leaves, thyme and peppermint. These herbs and spices are to give them their aromatic character.
Gather the 2 liters of water into the pot, making sure you cover the vegetables well. Add some salt but don't miss, as it's best to adjust the taste by using the stock in your recipes.

Lleva la olla a fuego alto hasta que el agua comience a hervir. Luego, reduce el fuego a bajo y deja que hierva lentamente durante unos 45-60 minutos. Este tiempo es clave para que las verduras suelten todo su sabor.
When the stock is ready, cover it through a fine paddle or gauze to remove solid remains. Let him cool if you plan to store it.
Keep the stock in hermetic containers. If you plan to use them several times, divide them into portions and freeze them so that they are ready as soon as you need them.

vegan-stew-with-black-lentils-lezzet.name: Vegan Stew With Black Lentils

ingredients.item: 1 cup of boiled black lentil (or another pulse)

instructions: 1. Slate eggplants in the stove or oven.
2. Pour the inner part with olive oil and salt, divided into longitudinal two.
3. Prepare a salad with the remaining ingredients and serve with plenty of addition to the eggplant.
4.  Afiyet olsun.

vegetable-soup-recipe-with-tomato-and-ca.name: Vegetable Soup Recipe With Tomato And Cabbage
vegetable-soup-recipe-with-tomato-and-ca.original_name: Receta de sopa de verduras con tomate y repollo

ingredients.item: 2 dregs (without shell and cut into cubes)

instructions: En una licuadora incorpora los tomates, la cebolla y un diente de ajo. Vierte una taza de agua.
It's good till the ingredients get crushed and form a salsa.
Calienta una olla con aceite. Vierte la salsa de tomate y cebolla mas el cubo de caldo de pollo. Mezcla y cocina por un par de minutos.
Add cauliflower and broccoli. Season with salt and pepper to taste. Mix and kitchen with soft heat cover for 10 minutes.
Incorpora las calabacitas y el repollo, mezcla y cocina por 5 minutos.
Turn off and add the cilantro cuff to integrate.
Serves and goes with lemon juice.

vegetarian-spring-rolls.name: Vegetarian Spring Rolls
instructions: 1. Heat 1 tablespoon of the oil in a large skillet or wok over medium heat.
2. Add the onions, saute for 2 minutes. Add in garlic, ginger, carrots and mushrooms and saute for 3 minutes.
3. Add the cabbage, kale, scallions and salt and saute an additional 3 minutes.
4. In a small bowl, whisk together the soy sauce, rice vinegar and sesame oil, and add it to the skillet. Stir to coat the veggies well. Remove from the heat and allow to cool slightly.
5. Place one spring roll wrapper on a flat surface in front of you, with a corner facing you, so it makes a diamond shape.
6. Place 2 tablespoons of the filling in a line in middle of the wrapper.
7. Fold the corners toward the center on top of the filling and the bottom corner over the top of the filing. Brush a little water on the top corner and roll it up like a burrito.
8. Heat the remaining 3 tablespoons oil in the skillet or wok over medium heat.

9. Place a few spring rolls in the pan, making sure you have room to roll them. Cook them on each side for 2–5 minutes, until they are golden brown on each side. Each spring roll will take about 7–10 minutes to fully cook.

very-dairy-strawberry-shortcake-dip.name: Very Dairy Strawberry Shortcake Dip
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C).
Beat heavy cream in a bowl with an electric mixer until stiff peaks form; set aside.
Beat cream cheese, milk, 1 ½ teaspoons strawberry jam, and confectioners' sugar in a separate bowl; fold in whipped cream. Cover the bowl; refrigerate until ready to serve.
Whisk flour, white sugar, baking powder, and salt together in a bowl; cut in shortening with a knife or pastry blender until mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
Beat buttermilk and egg yolk together in a separate bowl; stir into flour mixture until just mixed.
Turn dough out onto a lightly floured surface; knead 5 to 6 turns. Pat or roll dough into a ½-inch thick round. Cut 1-inch biscuits using a biscuit cutter; place on a baking sheet.
Bake in the preheated oven until golden brown, 10 to 15 minutes. Cool for 10 minutes; transfer to a wire rack to cool completely.
Halve biscuits. Skewer 1 biscuit bottom, 1 strawberry slice, and 1 biscuit top onto each toothpick.
Stir remaining 1 tablespoon strawberry jam into cream cheese dip; serve with shortcake skewers.

victoria-sponge-cake.name: Victoria Sponge Cake
instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C (175 degrees C). Grease two 7-inch cake pans and line with parchment paper.

Sift self-rising flour into a bowl; add sugar, margarine, and 1/2 teaspoon vanilla extract. Crack in eggs; beat with a wooden spoon or an electric mixer until pale and fluffy, about 3 minutes. Divide batter between the cake pans; smooth the tops with the back of a spoon.

Bake in the preheated oven until top is golden brown and a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean, 30 to 40 minutes. Cool in the pans for 5 minutes. Invert onto a wire rack to cool completely, about 20 minutes.
Sift confectioners' sugar into a bowl; add butter and 1/2 teaspoon vanilla extract. Beat with an electric mixer until frosting is light and fluffy.
Spread jam over 1 cake layer; cover jam with frosting. Place second cake layer on top.

vietnamese-chicken-noodle-soup.name: Vietnamese Chicken Noodle Soup

ingredients.prep: tough outer layer removed, stalk lightly smashed
fresh tender herbs (such as Thai basil, mint, or cilantro), and lime wedges (for serving)

instructions: Bring chicken, onion, carrots, celery, and 5 quarts water to a boil in a large heavy pot. Reduce heat and simmer, skimming surface occasionally, until broth is flavorful and reduced by one-fourth, about 2 hours.
Strain stock through a fine-mesh sieve into a large bowl; discard solids. (You should have about 4 quarts). Let cool, then cover and chill.
DO AHEAD: Stock can be made 5 days ahead. Let cool, then cover and chill.
Rub chicken legs with five-spice powder, grated ginger, 1 Tbsp. salt, and 1 Tbsp. sugar; let sit 15 minutes.

Meanwhile, heat broiler. Spread out halved ginger and onions on a rimmed baking sheet and broil, turning occasionally, until charred all over, 15–20 minutes. Add lemongrass, cardamom, star anise, cinnamon, and cloves to onions and ginger and broil until lightly charred and fragrant, about 1 minute.
Transfer onion mixture to a large heavy pot. Add chicken stock and fish sauce and bring to a boil. Add seasoned chicken, reduce heat, and simmer until chicken is just cooked through, 20–25 minutes.

Using tongs, transfer chicken to a plate. Let cool slightly, then remove skin and bones; discard. Shred meat. Continue to simmer broth until it reduces slightly and flavors concentrate, 50–60 minutes. Season with more salt and/or sugar, if desired. Strain into a large bowl or clean pot.

Cook noodles according to package directions. Using tongs or a spider, transfer noodles to a colander and run under cold water to stop cooking; set aside. (Keep pot of boiling water handy for reheating noodles.)
Just before serving, return noodle cooking water to a boil. Place noodles in a fine-mesh sieve and lower into hot water to reheat, 30 seconds.
Divide noodles among warm bowls and add shredded chicken and bean sprouts. Ladle hot broth over, dividing evenly. Serve with Spicy Pickled Shallots, herbs, and lime wedges for squeezing over.
DO AHEAD: Seasoned chicken broth can be made 2 days ahead. Let cool, then cover and chill. Bring to a boil before serving.

vietnamese-duck-soup.name: Vietnamese Duck Soup

ingredients.item: (or more) fish sauce (such as nam pla or nuoc nam)*

instructions: Heat heavy large pot over high heat. Sprinkle duck with salt and pepper. Add to pot; sauté until deep brown, about 6 minutes per side. Add broth, onion, ginger, 2 tablespoons fish sauce, and sugar; bring to boil. Reduce heat; simmer uncovered until duck is very tender, adjusting heat to maintain simmer, 45 to 60 minutes.

Using tongs, transfer duck to rimmed baking sheet. Cool 30 minutes. Skin and bone duck. Coarsely shred duck meat. Strain broth into large bowl; discard solids. Spoon fat from top of broth into small bowl; reserve. Return broth and duck to same pot. DO AHEAD Can be made 1 day ahead. Chill soup uncovered until cold, then cover and keep chilled. Cover and chill duck fat.
Cook rice vermicelli in large saucepan of boiling water until just tender, stirring occasionally, 3 to 5 minutes. Drain, rinse with cold water, and drain again. Cut noodles in half to shorten.

Melt 2 tablespoons reserved duck fat in same saucepan over medium-high heat. Add shallots; sauté 3 minutes. Add tomatoes and bamboo shoots. Cook until juices thicken, about 7 minutes longer. Add tomato mixture to soup. Simmer until flavors blend, 5 to 10 minutes. Season with salt, pepper, and more fish sauce if desired.
Divide noodles, cabbage, and herbs among 6 large bowls. Ladle in soup. Serve, passing hot sauce and lime wedges.

vinagrete-brazilian-tomato-slaw.name: Vinagrete (brazilian Tomato Slaw)

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Combine tomatoes, bell pepper, cucumber, onion, parsley, lime juice, olive oil, green onions, cilantro, vinegar, salt, and black pepper in a large bowl. Let stand at room temperature until flavors combine, about 3 hours.
